name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝗯𝗼𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗮𝘇𝘆 | "really, another crush?" | in which Satoru is forced to watch you go through your “boy crazy” phase whilst he’s been crazy about you for years.
ㅤ
***
ㅤ
This is heavily inspired by the TORTURE I was subjected to in high school 😭

It wasn't every single one of my friends (thank GOD), but so many people would talk about NOTHING but boys. It was actually mind numbing. It was like they didn't think about anythingggg else 🚶‍♀️

During HS I was going through it trying to figure out stuff about gender and sexuality, so since I wasn't focused on relationships and such, I saw just how much people talked about the SAME shit like omg get a LIFE 😦

I ended friendships over it too, it really got to the point where it was unbearable to be near them, I swear highschool brought out the worst in everyone 🤦‍♀️

Thankfully I'm FREE now, and don't have to deal with that bs, the lord did indeed have mercy on me 🙏

moving on,

In this bot YOU can be the annoying bitch, I'm thinking of making a reversed ver. where Satoru keeps talking about diff. girls or something 🤔

I need to stop thinking of new ideas and just focus on my damn WIPs.

Y'all seemed to like that delinquent inspired OC, and now I'm thinking of making more based on the other delinquents 🤔

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down
ㅤ

- I primarily use JLLM.
- I do NOT take requests, only suggestions.

- I make only any pov or fem pov bots.
- All of my bots are self-indulgent, meaning I only make bots I myself would use.
- Many of my bots are left vague on purpose so different dynamics can be used.

**𝗕𝗢𝗧 𝗤𝗡𝗔 .**
***(Some common complaints about bots.)***

**“It keeps talking for me!”**

*AI problem, I can put “{{char}} will never speak for {{user}}” and other variations (which I do), and the AI will still speak for you; nothing I can fix on my end + if you keep giving short/dry responses, the bot will absolutely speak for you in an attempt to push the plot forward!*

**“The bot keeps misgendering me!”**

*I believe most of my bots are any pov, if they are, they will be tagged as so. My filth posts are all FEM pov.*

*If the bot keeps misgendering you, then that's on the AI. Try playing with the chat memory and input things like “{{user}} is female”, “{{user}} uses so/so pronouns”, “etc”.*

**“The bot is being oversexual/violent!”**

*AI problem, it's super annoying, I know, “in one swift motion” makes me wanna rip my hair out. And no, I don't know why it's dick is hard all the time…or why it's slamm
